name: Machine Learning Reading Program
tagline: Read, discuss, and explore machine learning research with the UW community.
description: MLRP pairs undergraduates with graduate and postdoctoral researchers to read and discuss approximately eight machine learning-related research papers over the course of a quarter.

mentee.title: Mentee Application
mentee.description: For undergraduate students looking to gain exposure to current ML research.

mentor.title: Mentor Application
mentor.description: For graduate students and postdocs looking to gain mentorship experience.

footer.message: Built with care by the MLRP team at the University of Washington.
